description_long: This is a medium-sized sailing yacht with a sleek, elongated hull painted in a combination of red and gray, featuring a gold accent along the waterline. The deck is wooden with several hatches, two large circular structures (likely gun turrets or observation platforms), and a central smokestack. The yacht is equipped with three tall masts, each rigged with white triangular sails, and a fourth smaller mast at the stern. Lifeboats are mounted on both port and starboard sides, and the stern features a small red structure, possibly a flag or navigation light. The overall design suggests a blend of classic sailing yacht and early steam-powered vessel, with a flat, open deck and minimal superstructure.
description: A classic sailing yacht with three tall masts, a wooden deck, and a sleek red and gray hull accented with gold. Features include lifeboats, a central smokestack, and large circular deck structures.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the yacht, three masts with sails, lifeboats, and the gold-accented hull.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, central smokestack, and symmetrical placement of lifeboats.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the hull, masts, sails, and deck features from starboard, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the deck layout, circular structures, hatches, and the arrangement of masts and lifeboats.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a streamlined, elongated shape, flat deck, and a gold accent stripe along the waterline. The hull is painted red below the waterline and gray above, with a pointed bow and rounded stern.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level open deck with two large circular structures, a central smokestack, multiple hatches, three masts with rigging, and lifeboats mounted on both sides. The deck is wooden with minimal superstructure and clear walkways.
attribute_cabin_structure: No prominent cabin structure is visible; the deck is mostly open with only a central smokestack and circular deck features. No windows or doors are apparent.
